commands.review_summary:
Adds a Go conformance test that checks every built-in provider advertising `FeatureURLBridge` configures a backend implementing `core.BridgeProvider`, with offline configs for E2B and Railway.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a test-hardening PR rather than a bug report. Source inspection shows current main lacks the proposed registry-wide URL bridge conformance test.

target.title: docs: add Clawcks install option
target.body:
﻿## Summary
- Add a Clawcks install page.
- Add Clawcks to the install hosting list.
- Add the new page to docs navigation.
- Add explicit third-party credential trust wording before setup steps.

## What Problem This Solves
People choosing where to run OpenClaw cannot currently find Clawcks in the install docs. The install overview lists other hosting options, but Clawcks has no page or navigation entry.

## Why This Change Was Made
This adds a requested, neutral docs page for Clawcks as an opinionated hosted OpenClaw option. The page also makes the third-party credential trust boundary explicit before onboarding and deploy steps.

The change is limited to install docs, docs navigation, and the i18n glossary entry for the Clawcks brand name. It does not change runtime behavior, installer behavior, or config.

## User Impact
Users can now discover Clawcks from the install overview, see that Clawcks is independent from OpenClaw, understand that Clawcks handles entered credentials as the hosted Gateway operator, and decide whether hosted Clawcks setup fits better than managing their own server, container, network, filesystem, and deployment process.

## Evidence
The new page appears in the docs index, internal links resolve, credential-trust wording appears before the prerequisites/deploy handoff, and the touched docs pass formatting and whitespace checks. CI `check-docs` and `Real behavior proof` were green before the latest docs-only review update; new CI is running on the pushed commit.

## Verification
- `pnpm docs:list`
- `pnpm docs:check-mdx`
- `pnpm docs:check-links`
- `pnpm docs:check-i18n-glossary`
- `oxfmt --check` on touched docs
- `git diff --check`
target.author: liorb-mountapps
